steps.title: Count total observations and find median position
steps.content: Add all the frequencies from the Number of days column: $$3 + 3 + 4 + 1 + 3 + 9 = 23$$ total days. For 23 observations, the median is located at position $$\frac{23 + 1}{2} = 12$$.

steps.title: Use cumulative frequency to locate the 12th observation
steps.content:
Count cumulatively down the table:
  • 14 birds: 3 cumulative (positions 1-3)
  • 15 birds: 6 cumulative (positions 4-6)
  • 16 birds: 10 cumulative (positions 7-10)
  • 17 birds: 11 cumulative (position 11)
  • 18 birds: 14 cumulative (positions 12-14)
The 12th position falls in the row with 18 birds. A Desmos list check gives the same median directly, so the answer is 18.
